amendment_target: Proposal for a regulation — Article 9 — paragraph 2 — point b
body_md:
**Target:** Proposal for a regulation — Article 9 — paragraph 2 — point b

## Text proposed by the Commission

(b) estimation and evaluation of the risks that may emerge when the high-risk AI system is used in accordance with its intended purpose and under conditions of reasonably foreseeable misuse;

(b)

## Amendment of the European Parliament

deleted

estimation and evaluation of the risks that may emerge when the high-risk AI system is used in accordance with its intended purpose and under conditions of reasonably foreseeable misuse;
commission_text:
(b) estimation and evaluation of the risks that may emerge when the high-risk AI system is used in accordance with its intended purpose and under conditions of reasonably foreseeable misuse;

(b)
